---
name: Task / Chore
about: A non-feature work item — tooling, tests, infra, refactor, or a technical task
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## What

What needs doing, and where in the codebase (files, modules).

## Why

Why it matters — the problem it solves or the risk it removes.

## Done when

How we'll know it's finished (tests pass, gate added, doc updated, …).

## Notes

Relevant ADRs, skills, prior issues, or constraints. Add labels: one `type:*`, one or more `area:*`.
See docs/ISSUE-WORKFLOW.md for the label glossary.
